perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The host, a middle-aged man with glasses and a flat cap, speaks directly to the camera with high energy. (2) Quick cut to the host standing in front of a mobile phone display case in a retail store, gesturing towards products from vivo and realme. (3) Transition back to the host in a home studio setting; he uses wide hand gestures as graphic icons of a magnifying glass, the Statue of Liberty, and a hair dryer appear around him. (4) Screen capture of a mobile app interface showing video thumbnails, AI-generated text descriptions, and highlights for noise-canceling headphones. (5) Host continues to speak with an overlay of the US flag and the YouTube Premium logo. (6) The host closes the video by leaning forward and looking intently at the camera, asking the audience a question while the background remains a soft-focus indoor room.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks rapidly and enthusiastically in Mandarin. (2) Digital sound effects like 'pops' or 'dings' occur as text overlays and icons appear on screen. (3) The music maintains a constant, driving rhythm throughout the host's continuous narration, which stays at a high volume and fast pace. (4) The music volume stays consistent until the final two seconds, where it fades out as the host finishes his call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'YouTube 也加入 AI 戰局!' - Hook text in bold black and red, highlighting the main topic of the video. (2) '推薦大家買手機到米可' - Promotional text encouraging viewers to buy phones at a specific shop. (3) '可以直接用 AI 回答你的影片搜尋問題' - Functional text explaining the core AI feature. (4) '直接就可以重點解答!' - Hook text emphasizing the speed and utility of the new feature. (5) '美國部分 Premium 用戶測試' - Factual information regarding the feature's limited availability. (6) '點擊、觀看時數會不會就下滑了?' - Questioning text raising concerns for content creators. (7) '所以你支持這種 AI 摘要嗎?' - Call-to-action question to engage the audience.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Sponsor/Store Mention -> Technical Feature Demonstration -> Analytical Discussion of Impact -> Audience Questioning

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main creator (Tim哥) is visible throughout the entire video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged Asian male with short hair, wearing a brown flat cap, black-rimmed glasses, and a white t-shirt with the text 'MAY THE' visible. He wears several beaded and cord bracelets on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a brightly lit indoor studio with neutral-colored walls, a wooden shelf, and grey curtains. A secondary background shows the interior of 'Miko 米可手機館', featuring retail displays for vivo, realme, and Samsung smartphones.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting with soft shadows

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Sponsorship -> Information Disclosure -> Critique -> Call-to-Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video functions as a timely tech update informing the audience about YouTube's new AI features, specifically the search Q&A and auto-summaries. It aims to educate viewers on how to use these tools while simultaneously stimulating a debate about the feature's potential negative impact on content creator metrics. Additionally, it serves as a commercial vehicle for 'Miko 米可手機館' by positioning them as the recommended place for buying tech products mentioned.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host directly tells the audience to 'buy phones at Miko' and the video includes a physical location shoot at the store with persistent brand watermarks.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The host 'Tim哥' utilizes his established personal brand (hat, glasses, fast-paced commentary) and local dialect cues to build trust with a Taiwanese tech-focused audience.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes the 'talking head' format combined with rapid screen-recording cuts to maintain high engagement for a short-form video platform.
